rules.rule: Prefer @vyrnforge/ui-components before creating raw custom controls.

rules.reason: UniversalDataGrid is specialized grid behavior, not a generic layout component.

rules.rule: Do not use DataGrid as generic layout.
rules.reason: Use layout primitives such as Card, Panel, Stack, Inline, and Section.

rules.rule: Use Button for primary or business actions.
rules.reason: Visible labels are clearer for important actions.

rules.rule: Use IconButton or ToolbarButton for repeated utility actions.
rules.reason: They provide consistent compact action styling.

rules.rule: Every icon-only button needs an aria-label.
rules.reason: Screen reader users need a text name for the control.

rules.rule: Use CSS variables for styling customization.
rules.reason: VyrnForge theming is token-driven and scoped.

rules.rule: Do not add MUI, Tailwind, Radix, TanStack, Redux, styled-components, Emotion, icon libraries, or CSS frameworks unless explicitly approved.
Keep app data fetching outside VyrnForge packages.
rules.reason: Apps own backend rows, auth, permissions, retries, and cache.

rules.rule: Check component status before using planned components.
rules.reason: Planned components may not exist in package exports yet.

rules.rule: Before using a VyrnForge component or contract, check docs/api and docs/metadata.
rules.reason: API docs define public usage while metadata provides structured lookup.

rules.rule: Do not use undocumented internal APIs unless explicitly asked.
rules.reason: Only documented exports, props, tokens, and adapter contracts are stable public API.
ui-core must stay lowest-level, ui-components must not depend on ui-data-grid.
